title: Archive groups using Automations

posts.author: kris1 (Kristofer)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi all. At our company we use the group as a container for entire purchase orders. The group is the heading under which an array of products and quantities are listed. When the purchase order has moved through the shop and is shipped to the customer the entire group needs to be removed from the board.

I would like to be able to run an automation that will archive an entire group to a ‘finished’ board when a status column changes to done. I can do this using the “move to” drop down menu, but have not found an automation recipe that allows for doing this automatically.
